dialogos.texto_en: Hey, did you find anything?
Ah, Futaro.
It doesn't seem like we're going to decide on anything\nanytime soon. There are so many good things\nthat makes it so much harder to choose from.
It seems like this shop promotes weaving.\nLook, it's beautiful, don't you think?
I heard it's called 'bingata' dyeing.
It's a dyeing method called 'bingata.'\nThe colors are so vivid, aren't they?
Wow, they sell small items made of woven fabric.
Oh, this is cute.
A woven smartphone case?\nWow, that's nice.
They also have a matching patterned pass case.
Oh, they even have a shoulder bag!\nWow, I really want to get them all.
You've fallen into the store's trap, haven't you?
Now, don't say it like that.
Futaro, you have a twisted way of thinking.
Whatever.
Just looking at these cute things makes me happy.
Yeah, I just can't get enough of them.
They might make for good souvenirs.\nMatching pouches or something would be nice.
We could get the same pattern but in different colors,\nor get different patterns but in the same color\nto create more matching options.
But a pouch might not suit Futaro.\nThese pouches are too cute.
...I have to agree myself.\nAnd I can't think of a use for it.\nWhat do you guys put in these things?
What, you ask? Various things.\nLike makeup tools.
...I realize\nthat this isn't something I'm familiar with.
Well, for you, Futaro-kun...\nhow about a pen case?\nIt's a bit big, but it might work.
I wouldn't like a cute pen case like this, don't you think?
Well, at first glance, it might not suit you,\nbut you might get used to it and start liking it%p-2;――
Sorry, it still seems unlikely.\nAn enjoyable souvenir might be better for you.
Hey, what do you mean by 'enjoyable'?
Ah, look at this.\nThis woven barrette would look great on you, Miku.
Really? I don't know about that.
Well, it's definitely not suitable for Futaro-kun,\nso it's not a good souvenir.
That's even more unlikely to suit me than the pouch.
If I saw him wearing it, I would definitely laugh.
(...A barrette, huh? I can see how it would\n look good on Miku, but with this color%p-2;――%p;)
If it was this color,\nit might also suit you, Ichika, right?
Huh?
Just like this%p-2;――
See, I thought so. It suits you too, Ichika.\nMy sense of fashion isn't so bad after all.
U-ummm... Th-thank you?\nBut, well, it's just that...
What is it?
It feels like I'm being pat on the head,\nand it's a little embarrassing.
Hey, my bad...\nI didn't mean to do that.
Ahahaha,\nyou don't have to apologize.\nI was just a little surprised.
O-okay.
Ahem.
You know, this kind of thing is refreshing.\nTo stroke your head like this%p-2;――
No, I've done this before.\nWhen I stayed over at your house to study.
Ah, yeah! That's right!\nIt was hot for autumn that day, wasn't it?
No, it was cold, you know?
W-was it now?
Ah, but you seemed to dislike it back then.\nSorry, if you don't like being pet%p-2;――
N-no! It's not like that!\nI'm just not used to it\nsince I'm the older sister...
If it's you, I don't mind being treated like this.
I see, well then, that's good.
Ahem.
You're short, aren't ya?
Huh? What's gotten into you all of a sudden?\nWell, compared to you, I'm shorter, yeah.
I see, but...\nyou usually feel taller, or something...
(Why am I suddenly thinking about this?)
Ah, it's a little embarrassing\nto have you stare at me like that...
Ah, I see!
Wah! What's going on now?
(Ichika is always one step ahead of us.\n Maybe that's why she seems taller.)
Nothing, really.\nIt's just something I have on my mind.
Don't get ahead of yourself...\nAs an older sister,\nit's hard for me to react to these things.
You're doing your best, Ichika.
*sigh*\nThank you very...much?
Well, I don't feel so bad...\nI guess I'll stay like this a little longer.
Ahem.
Hey, I'm glad you two are so close,\nbut don't forget about me, okay?
O-of course we wouldn't forget about you!\nRight, Futaro-kun?!
Y-yeah, definitely!\nLet's get back to our souvenir search!
Right on!\nFor now, textiles are on the list too!
Come on...
